agents.bio: Taylor specializes in helping North Dallas families coordinate auto, home, and retirement strategies with an emphasis on straightforward coverage explanations.
Serving Midtown Atlanta drivers and professionals with customized auto and life insurance solutions.
Sam focuses on protecting Chicago homeowners and condo owners with tailored property coverage.
agents.office_hours: Mon–Thu 9:00 AM–6:00 PM; Fri 9:00 AM–4:00 PM

agents.bio: Emily helps Bay Area professionals build long-term financial plans with coordinated retirement and life coverage.
Daniel focuses on bundled auto and home solutions for Dallas-area families looking to save on premiums.
Olivia advises North Side families on retirement income strategies and college savings.
agents.office_hours: Mon–Thu 10:00 AM–7:00 PM; Sat 9:00 AM–1:00 PM

agents.bio: James has over 15 years of experience helping Atlanta drivers find right-sized auto coverage.
Priya works with growing families and small businesses on protection and long-term planning.
Michael helps coastal homeowners address earthquake and liability risks in the Bay Area.
Rachel focuses on simple bundled auto and home solutions for Addison residents.
Jason offers fee-based retirement and investment guidance for Atlanta professionals.
Linda works primarily with small businesses; limited availability for new personal auto clients.

events.title: Retirement Planning Basics Workshop
events.description: An in-person workshop covering how to estimate retirement income needs, Social Security timing, and building a diversified portfolio.

events.title: Evening Strategies for Tax-Smart Retirement
events.description: Explore tax-efficient withdrawal strategies, Roth conversions, and required minimum distributions in this small-group session.

events.title: Virtual Retirement Readiness Checkup
events.description: A live virtual session walking through a retirement readiness checklist and common pitfalls.

events.title: Insurance Basics for New Homeowners
events.description: Learn how home, auto, and umbrella policies work together to protect your assets.

events.title: Intro to Investing: Stocks, Bonds, and Funds
events.description: A beginner-friendly overview of core investing concepts, risk, and diversification.

events.title: Weekend Family Financial Planning Day
events.description: Drop-in stations covering budgeting, debt management, and college savings.

events.title: Estate Planning Essentials
events.description: Understand wills, trusts, and beneficiary designations to protect your legacy.

events.title: Understanding Your Insurance Policies (Webinar)
events.description: Virtual walkthrough of key terms in auto, home, and life insurance contracts.

events.title: Advanced Investing for Near-Retirees
events.description: Review asset allocation glidepaths and sequence-of-returns risk for those within 10 years of retirement.

events.title: Retirement Planning Lunch & Learn
events.description: Short lunchtime session on core retirement planning milestones.

funds.name: SecurePath 2035 Target Date Fund
funds.objective: Provide growth for investors planning to retire around 2035 with a gradually decreasing risk profile.
funds.holdings_summary: 60% global equities, 35% investment-grade bonds, 5% cash equivalents.

funds.name: Core Equity Index Fund
funds.objective: Track the performance of a broad U.S. equity index before fees and expenses.
funds.holdings_summary: Large- and mid-cap U.S. stocks across all sectors.

funds.name: Balanced Income & Growth Fund
funds.objective: Seek a balance of current income and capital appreciation with moderate volatility.
funds.holdings_summary: 50% equities, 45% bonds, 5% cash and cash equivalents.

funds.name: Conservative Bond Income Fund
funds.objective: Provide current income with minimal volatility through diversified fixed income holdings.
funds.holdings_summary: Investment-grade corporate and government bonds with short to intermediate maturities.

funds.name: Global Growth Opportunities Fund
funds.objective: Aggressive capital appreciation through a diversified global equity portfolio.

funds.name: Moderate Index Blend Fund
funds.objective: Deliver market-based returns with a 60/40 stock-bond allocation using low-cost index strategies.
funds.holdings_summary: 60% U.S. and international equity index funds, 40% U.S. investment-grade bond index funds.

funds.name: Moderate Core Index Fund
funds.objective: Provide a low-cost moderate risk option for long-term retirement investors.
funds.holdings_summary: 55% U.S. equity index, 15% international equity index, 30% U.S. bond index.

funds.name: Capital Preservation Stable Value Fund
funds.objective: Preserve principal while generating modest, bond-like returns.
funds.holdings_summary: Guaranteed investment contracts and high-quality short-term bonds.

funds.name: Aggressive Small Cap Growth Fund
funds.objective: Seek maximum long-term capital appreciation through small-cap growth stocks.

funds.name: Income Focused Bond Index Fund
funds.objective: Track a broad U.S. bond index to provide income and diversification.
funds.holdings_summary: U.S. Treasury, agency, and investment-grade corporate bonds.

funds.name: Real Asset Inflation Hedge Fund
funds.objective: Provide inflation protection through exposure to commodities, real estate, and infrastructure.
funds.holdings_summary: Global REITs, commodity-linked securities, infrastructure stocks.

funds.name: Legacy Balanced Fund (Closed to New Investors)
funds.objective: Provide a traditional 60/40 balanced allocation with a long performance history.
funds.holdings_summary: 60% U.S. and international equities, 40% U.S. bonds.
